title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Yes Bank Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Yes Bank Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Yes Bank Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Yes Bank Global Group:
Yes Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank Global Group!
